deep_dives.thesis: Structural supply deficit (6th consecutive year, 67 Moz shortfall 2026) with strong industrial demand from AI/5G/EV offsetting solar PV decline. G/S ratio compressed from 105:1 to ~57:1. Institutional forecasts: JPM $81 avg, ING $83, UBS $85, Commerzbank $90 year-end. TD Securities bearish outlier at $44. Target $120, conviction 0.8.

key_predictive_features.notes: Mean reversion from extremes is historically reliable. Since 1985, ratio extremes >80:1 triggered ~7 trades, each profitable via mean reversion. Base case: 70:1 by year-end. Below 50:1 historically precedes silver tops — use as exit signal.

key_predictive_features.current_value: Net long 24,671 contracts (34,591 long, 9,920 short) as of May 19, 2026
key_predictive_features.notes: Open interest 100,751 contracts. Spec positioning not at extremes — room for more longs. COT extremes (>50K net long) historically precede reversals. Our COT signal at 100% accuracy but only 5 samples — directionally correct but sample too small for confidence.

key_predictive_features.current_value: 67 Moz deficit projected 2026, sixth consecutive year
key_predictive_features.notes: Total output 1.05 Boz (mine 820 Moz + recycling). Above-ground stocks fallen 762 Moz since 2021. Most silver is byproduct (zinc, copper, lead mining) — supply cannot ramp quickly. This is the structural bull case.

key_predictive_features.current_value: 194 Moz demand (-7% YoY) despite 15% capacity growth
key_predictive_features.notes: Silver now 17-29% of PV module cost per watt (up from 3% in 2023). Manufacturers actively reducing silver per cell (thrifting). Solar demand declining but AI datacenter + 5G + EV absorbing slack. Net industrial demand stable.
Dollar strength is primary short-term headwind. Any Fed pivot signal → instant XAG rally. Track DXY as leading indicator.
Offsetting jewelry decline (-9% to 178 Moz, lowest since 2020). Coins + bars demand surging. Indicates retail/institutional conviction.

fundamental_drivers.detail: Six consecutive deficit years. 67 Moz gap in 2026. Above-ground stocks depleted 762 Moz since 2021. Byproduct mining means supply is inelastic to price.

Solar PV demand declining 7% but AI datacenters, 5G infrastructure, EV electronics filling the gap. Total industrial demand stable-to-growing. Silver Institute highlights strong structural growth in non-solar industrial segments.
At $80+, silver is 17-29% of PV module cost. Manufacturers actively reducing silver content per cell. IBC and TOPCon cells use less silver. This caps the upper end of solar demand growth.
Ratio compressed from 105:1 to 57:1. Analysts project 40-50:1 by end 2026. Historical mean reversion pattern is one of the most reliable signals in precious metals.
JPM $81, ING $83, UBS $85, Commerzbank $90. Major houses aligned on upside from current $75.57. Only TD Securities bearish at $44.
Central banks buying gold at record pace indirectly supports silver through G/S ratio arbitrage. Gold floor supports silver floor.

XAU-USD.relationship: High positive. Silver is leveraged gold play — amplifies gold moves 1.5-2x. Gold is the anchor; silver is the sail.
XAU-USD.signal_value: Gold breakouts precede silver breakouts by 1-3 days. Watch gold for silver entry timing.

DXY.relationship: Strong negative. Dollar strength = metals weakness. Fed policy is transmitted through DXY.
DXY.signal_value: DXY breakdown below key support → aggressive silver long signal.

Copper_HG.relationship: Positive — both industrial metals. Copper leads silver in industrial demand cycles.
Copper_HG.signal_value: Copper/gold ratio rising = risk-on = silver outperformance. Already tracked in metals_cross_asset signal.

US_10Y_Yield.relationship: Negative — rising real yields are headwind for non-yielding metals.
US_10Y_Yield.signal_value: Monitor real yield (nominal minus breakeven). Real yield declining → metals bullish.

Oil_WTI.relationship: Moderate positive — inflation proxy. Oil rally → inflation expectations → metals bid.
Oil_WTI.signal_value: Secondary indicator. Oil crash → risk-off → mixed for silver (safe haven vs industrial).

seasonal_patterns.detail: New year investment allocation + physical buying. Strong seasonal bid.
Post-Q1 investment fade. Jewelry demand seasonal low. Often marks annual low point.
Indian festival season pre-buying (Diwali in Oct/Nov). Industrial restocking for H2.
Highest probability of positive returns. Festival demand + year-end investment positioning.
May→June historically weak. If thesis is correct ($120 target), June weakness would be a buying opportunity. But seasonal patterns have broken down post-COVID — lower reliability than historical.

papers_and_models.title: Kalman Filter Gold-Silver Pair Trading
papers_and_models.finding: Kalman filter dynamic hedge estimation + ML regime filters for gold-silver pair trading. G/S ratio compressed from 100:1 to 57:1. Projected 40-50:1 by end 2026.
papers_and_models.applicability: Direct implementation for metals_cross_asset signal enhancement. Kalman filter hedge ratio would sharpen G/S ratio mean reversion entries.

papers_and_models.title: World Silver Survey 2026
papers_and_models.finding: Comprehensive supply/demand data. 67 Moz deficit. Physical investment +20%. Jewelry -9%. Mine production +1% to 820 Moz.
papers_and_models.applicability: Fundamental data source for quarterly thesis updates. Key metric: deficit magnitude trend.

papers_and_models.title: CME Precious Metals Outlook 2026
papers_and_models.finding: Market dynamics following record-breaking 2025. Institutional positioning analysis for gold and silver futures.
papers_and_models.applicability: COT positioning context and futures market structure analysis.

recommended_new_signals.detail: Compute G/S ratio z-score from 20-year mean. BUY silver when z-score > 1.5 (ratio too high = silver cheap). SELL when z-score < -1.0 (ratio too low = silver expensive). Use Kalman filter for dynamic mean estimation. Trigger ~2-3 times per year.
Track SLV + PSLV daily flow data. Net inflows → bullish. Net outflows → bearish. 3-day smoothing to reduce noise. Data available from ETF provider APIs.
10Y nominal yield minus 10Y breakeven inflation (TIPS). Declining real yield → metals bullish. FRED data already integrated (credit_spread_risk signal uses FRED). Low marginal implementation cost.
Track deficit magnitude trend from Silver Institute quarterly data. Widening deficit → bullish conviction increase. Narrowing deficit → reduce conviction. Very slow signal — quarterly update only.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: XAG consensus at 51.2% (2005 samples). Main issue: only 1 metals-specific active signal (metals_cross_asset at 54.6%, 518 sam). COT at 80-100% but catastrophically small sample (5-10). Priority: (1) enable direction-specific gating — some signals may be strong SELL-only for XAG; (2) add G/S ratio mean reversion as dedicated signal; (3) add real yield direction signal using existing FRED infrastructure. Seasonal approach: be cautious entering new longs in June (seasonal weakness), use any June dip as accumulation opportunity for July-October strength.

deep_dives.thesis: Post-halving cycle year 2 (Apr 2024 halving). Range-bound at $77K, down ~40% from peak. Emerging consensus: four-year halving cycle is over — ETF flows have replaced halving as dominant driver. On-chain accumulation metrics bullish (exchange reserves at 7-year low, MVRV Z-Score in accumulation zone). Institutional forecasts: $95K-$180K for 2026, with $150K as consensus median. S2F model (broken) projects $248-369K. Target $100K, conviction 0.7.

key_predictive_features.current_value: Underperforming 2025 pace; Apr 2026 saw 19K BTC absorbed in 9 days (9x mining supply)
key_predictive_features.notes: THE dominant price driver in post-ETF era. New signal hierarchy: monthly ETF flow > on-chain > regulatory > Fed. When institutional buyers absorb 9x daily new supply through a single product, the float shrinks and small demand increases move price disproportionately. We have NO ETF flow signal — this is the biggest gap.

Mar 7 2026: 32K BTC ($2.26B) departed exchanges in single day — largest single-day outflow on record. Supply on exchanges shrinking = accumulation. Every prior multi-year low in exchange reserves preceded major rallies.

key_predictive_features.current_value: 0.41-1.2 (reports vary, but solidly in accumulation zone)
key_predictive_features.notes: Every MVRV entry into 1.0-1.5 zone followed by bounce since 2013 produced positive 12-month returns (7/7). NUPL never entered Euphoria (>0.75) despite BTC >$125K peak — traditional cycle-top indicators need recalibration for ETF era.
STH-SOPR below 1 = capitulation selling. Historically marks local bottoms when sustained. Current readings suggest short-term holders are underwater — contrarian bullish.

key_predictive_features.current_value: Reduced put skew, growing interest in longer-dated upside
key_predictive_features.notes: Options positioning turning constructive. After 38.5% correction, reward-to-risk skew favors upside. Monitor 25-delta put/call skew for directional bias.

Our F&G signal at 58.6% accuracy with 10K samples — one of our best. Extreme fear (<20) = BUY. Key lesson from Feb 2026: Bold strategy entered at F&G=5 and lost 7.09%. Contrarian signal is correct but needs patience — don't front-run the bottom.

key_predictive_features.current_value: 270K BTC accumulated by whales in 30 days (prior report)
key_predictive_features.notes: Large holder supply change is a leading indicator. Whales accumulate before rallies. Not currently tracked as a signal — recommended addition.

fundamental_drivers.detail: ETF inflows have replaced halving as the marginal price driver. Institutional flows absorb multiples of daily mining supply. This fundamentally changes market structure — the float shrinks, liquidity thins, and demand moves price disproportionately. The four-year halving cycle may be dead, replaced by institutional flow cycles.

25 months post-halving (Apr 2024). Historical pattern: 12-18 month rally peaking Q3-Q4 of year 2. But 2025 broke pattern (declined instead of rallied). Epoch Ventures and Amberdata declare the cycle dead. Treat as supplementary, not primary thesis.
2.21M BTC on exchanges, 7-year low. Supply squeeze mechanics: less float = more price sensitivity to demand shocks. Record single-day outflows indicate institutional cold storage accumulation.
MicroStrategy holds 818K BTC. Corporate treasury adoption removes supply from circulation. MSTR acts as 1.5-2x leveraged BTC proxy.
Rising real yields, strong dollar, potential recession fears. BTC still correlates with risk assets in stress periods. Fed pivot timing is the key catalyst — any dovish shift → immediate BTC rally.

BTC at $77K, down 40% from peak. CoinCodex projects $75.8-79K range for near term. Could consolidate for months before next major move. Our range-bound detection should suppress trend-following signals.

MSTR.relationship: 1.5-2x leveraged proxy. Direct correlation. MSTR leads/lags BTC by hours.
MSTR.signal_value: MSTR divergence from BTC (premium/discount) is a sentiment indicator. MSTR leading BTC up = institutional conviction.

ETH-USD.relationship: High correlation but BTC leads. ETH is higher-beta crypto.
ETH-USD.signal_value: ETH/BTC ratio declining = risk-off within crypto. Rising = altcoin season starting. Currently BTC dominant.

DXY.relationship: Negative — dollar strength = BTC weakness. But weaker than for metals.
DXY.signal_value: DXY breakdown = crypto rally catalyst. Track alongside Fed language.

Gold_XAU.relationship: Positive in crisis (safe haven narrative), diverges in normal conditions.
Gold_XAU.signal_value: When gold rallies and BTC doesn't follow, it indicates BTC is trading as risk-on not safe-haven. Current regime: BTC as risk asset.

SPX_ES.relationship: Moderate positive — BTC increasingly correlated with equities since ETF launch.
SPX_ES.signal_value: Equity market regime affects BTC. Risk-off in equities → BTC sells off. ETF structure amplifies this correlation.

US_10Y_Yield.relationship: Mild negative. Rising yields = tighter financial conditions = BTC headwind.
US_10Y_Yield.signal_value: Secondary signal. Yield spikes precede BTC weakness by 1-2 weeks.

seasonal_patterns.reliability: Historical but possibly broken in ETF era
seasonal_patterns.detail: Prior cycles: year 2 post-halving is explosive rally phase. 2026 has not followed pattern — BTC down 40% from peak. The halving cycle may be dead, replaced by institutional flow dynamics.
Moves amplified on weekends. Flash crashes and flash rallies more common Sat-Sun. Today is Saturday — reduced liquidity.
System memory: appears repeatedly, always fades. Do not act on 12h timeframe BUY signals for BTC.
Historically flat or sudden moves. Thin liquidity + holiday trading desks. Next week — be cautious with position sizing.
If cycle thesis holds, Q3-Q4 2026 should be the peak rally phase. But if cycle is dead, this is less meaningful.

papers_and_models.title: Explainable Multimodal Framework for Real-Time Bitcoin Forecasting
papers_and_models.finding: Five modalities (market, on-chain, FGI, news, Reddit) with SHAP analysis. Technical indicators dominate; on-chain/sentiment contribute during shocks. Boruta + CNN-LSTM achieves 82.44% direction accuracy.
papers_and_models.applicability: Validates our multi-signal approach. Suggests on-chain signal should have higher weight during vol spikes, lower during calm periods.

papers_and_models.title: Bitcoin Price Forecasting: Blending On-Chain Data with ML Models
papers_and_models.finding: Practical guide to combining MVRV, SOPR, exchange flows with gradient boosting. Exchange reserve velocity and whale accumulation rate as top features.
papers_and_models.applicability: Our on-chain signal (60%, 45 sam) needs more feature inputs: add whale accumulation rate and exchange reserve change rate.

papers_and_models.title: End of the Four-Year Cycle (Amberdata 2026 Outlook)
papers_and_models.finding: ETF flows have replaced halving as dominant driver. NUPL never reached Euphoria despite $125K+ BTC. Traditional cycle models need recalibration. New regime: institutional flow cycles with shorter, shallower drawdowns but also lower blow-off tops.
papers_and_models.applicability: Our halving-based thesis needs updating. Reduce weight on cycle position, increase weight on ETF flow data. The signal hierarchy should be: ETF flows > on-chain > macro > cycle position.

papers_and_models.title: Institutional Crypto Flows & 2026 Market Analysis
papers_and_models.finding: Options market structure showing reduced put skew and growing longer-dated upside interest. After 38.5% correction, reward-to-risk favors upside.
papers_and_models.applicability: Options skew data could be a new signal. Track 25-delta put/call skew from Deribit or aggregate options data.

recommended_new_signals.detail: Track daily/weekly net ETF inflows/outflows (IBIT, FBTC, GBTC, etc.). Binary: net inflow = bullish, net outflow = bearish. 5-day smoothing. This is THE biggest gap in our signal system — ETF flows are the dominant price driver and we have zero coverage. Data from CoinGlass or TheBlock APIs.

Rate of change of exchange reserves (not just level). Accelerating outflows → accumulation intensifying → bullish. Can be derived from existing on-chain data sources (BGeometrics). Extend onchain_data.py.
Track large holder (>1000 BTC) supply change over 7/30 day windows. Net accumulation → bullish. Net distribution → bearish. Available from Glassnode or BGeometrics API.
25-delta put/call skew from Deribit. Extreme put skew (>15%) = fear = contrarian bullish. Extreme call skew (>10%) = greed = contrarian bearish. Deribit API is free for market data.

MSTR market cap vs BTC holdings implied value. Premium = institutional exuberance. Discount = institutional pessimism. Already have MSTR and BTC prices — just need the calculation. Extends btc_proxy signal.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC consensus at 52.7% (3157 samples). Biggest gap: NO ETF flow signal despite ETF flows being the dominant price driver post-2024. This is like trading silver without watching the G/S ratio. Priority: (1) add ETF flow direction signal using CoinGlass API; (2) extend on-chain signal with whale accumulation and exchange reserve velocity; (3) implement direction-specific gating (some signals may be SELL-only accurate for BTC). The halving cycle thesis is increasingly questioned — reduce weight on cycle-position reasoning in Layer 2 prompts. Range-bound at $77K: regime detection should be flagging this as ranging and suppressing trend-following signals. Memorial Day weekend next week — reduce position sizing due to thin liquidity.
